policy: Quarantined checks are tracked separately from required gates. Listing this manifest must be deterministic; running entries is opt-in with npm run test:quarantine -- --run.

entries.testName: full-file run intermittently reports Unable to deserialize cloned data from the Node test runner
entries.likelyCause: Node test-runner serialization or large runtime fixture state; observed as runner infrastructure failure rather than assertion failure.
entries.exitCondition: 10 consecutive full-file runs pass or root cause is isolated to a smaller deterministic fixture.
entries.replacementCoverage: Focused runtime.test.ts name-pattern runs covering cwd, storage, and tool-loop cases continue to pass.

entries.testName: smart permissions: prompts user on non-whitelisted
entries.likelyCause: Async permission timing or polling race; baseline also failed after stash during local audit.
entries.exitCondition: A deterministic permission fixture replaces the race or the isolated test passes 10 consecutive runs.
entries.replacementCoverage: Existing focused permission and runtime tool-loop tests remain required.
entries.command: NODE_ENV=test BABEL_O_CONFIG_FILE=/tmp/babel-o-quarantine-permission.json npx tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 --test-name-pattern="smart permissions: prompts user on non-whitelisted" test/permission-flow.test.ts
